chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-278 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.05.2025 Mr. Rashid Ali Shah advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Dhani Bux Mari Assistant P.G a/w IO Inspector Momal <>*<> Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that being sui-juris petitioner No.1 has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and being annoyed by such ceremonial marriage, her uncle /respondent No.5 has lodged a false FIR bearing Crime No.06 of 2025 at P.S Women District Mirpurkhas under Sections 365-B, 506 PPC read with Section 3(ii) of Preventions of Trafficking in Persons Act 2018. Investigation Officer of above crime has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui juris has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and no one has abducted her. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of petitioner No.1 she will file her report under Section 173 Cr.P.C before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Counsel for the petitioners expressed satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to file her report before the learned Magistrate concerned keeping in view of the statement of petitioner No.1/alleged abducted recorded under Section 161 Cr.P.C. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
